Rythmos® Gateway

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Mesh Hub
Redundancy
Alert Routing
Cloud Bridge

Overview

Rythmos® Gateway central hub for Rythmos® system connectivity, data aggregation, and cloud integration.

FUNCTIONS

Provides real-time resident location data
Routes alert events to Care Manager
Connects system to cloud platform

Key Capabilities

Mesh
Hub

Centralized
device data aggregation

Multi-Gateway
Support

Automatic
multi-gateway redundancy

Alert
Routing

Instant
caregiver alert delivery

Cloud
Bridge

Data
streaming to care platform

OTA
Updates

Remote
firmware updates

Redundant
Connectivity

Ethernet,
WiFi & cellular failover

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 65 × 40 × 15 mm
Network Connection: Wired LAN (Ethernet), WiFi
Power Source: 5.1V / 3.5A USB-C adapter
Mesh Network Protocol: Rythmos® Mesh Network · Wirepas 2.4 GHz based
Ports: USB, Ethernet
Compute: Raspberry Pi 5 / CM5
Memory: 8GB – 16GB LPDDR4X
Input: Full-size 105-key keyboard, trackpad
AV & Cam: 2MP USB Camera + Mic, speakers
Enclosure: CNC aluminum
Firmware Updates: Over-the-air (OTA)
Management Portal: Rythmos® Care Manager (web + mobile)
Installation: Indoor, fixed location
Certifications: FCC · ISED · CE

Network & Location Features

Central hub for the Rythmos® wireless mesh network

Wireless data collection from wearables and anchors

Supports in-community resident real-time location tracking

Over-the-air firmware updates — no on-site service required

Feeds data to the Rythmos® Care Manager web portal and mobile app

Multiple gateways supported — automatic redundancy and expanded coverage

System Topology — Gateway Deployment

Ideal for tracking and monitoring critical assets or individuals throughout the facility. Deploy in accordance with the community's layout to ensure full coverage and reliable alert delivery via the Rythmos® mesh infrastructure.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

-Install in fixed indoor location
-Do not relocate after setup

Positioning

-Place with coverage area
-Avoid enclosed locations

Cellular Setup

-Connect cellular modem
-Enable automatic failover

Network (Ethernet)

-Connect to facility LAN
-Primary system connection

Power

-Connect via USB-C adapter
-UPS backup recommended

Power Verification

-Confirm LEDs are active
-Devices should power on instantly

System Status

-Wait for startup
-Verify gateway is online

Anchor Setup

-Install anchor 1 ft from gateway
-Ensure proper mesh initialization

Coverage Setup

-Install anchors throughout area
-Increase density where needed

Validation

-Confirm connectivity and signal
-Verify data in Care Manager

intrexis.com
